name: SR-TTT Does Not Learn Retrieval: A Correction and Mechanistic Post-Mortem of Surprisal-Aware Residual Test-Time Training
summary: arXiv:2603.06642v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Test-Time Training (TTT) language models replace the KV-cache with fast weights updated during inference, achieving O(1) memory but sufferi...
description: arXiv:2603.06642v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Test-Time Training (TTT) language models replace the KV-cache with fast weights updated during inference, achieving O(1) memory but suffering catastrophic failure on exact-recall tasks. Version 1 of this work proposed SR-TTT, which routes high-surprisal tokens to a sparse exact-attention Residual Cache, and reported large Needle-in-a-Hay...
author: Swamynathan V P
